title: OpSight
description: A modern web application built to deliver operational clarity and actionable insights. Designed with a focus on clean architecture and real-time data visualization.

title: PeerCode()
description: A collaborative platform for CS students to post questions, receive peer feedback, and interact with an AI agent that provides contextual hints — making learning to code interactive and social.

title: Portfolio via DOM
description: A responsive portfolio showcasing dynamic project display, real-time form validation with regex, async JSON data loading, and clean event-driven architecture across desktop and mobile.

title: Restaurant Website
description: A clean, foundational restaurant site designed to grow — the architecture is built to integrate a full DOM-powered ordering system and self-checkout shopping cart in a future iteration.
